query: Johor state election 2026 expected outcome, green wave PN Perikatan Nasional Malay voters, Barisan Nasional incumbency, Onn Hafiz popularity
answer:
I've completed the research on the Johor 2026 state election. Here's a summary of the key findings:

## Bottom Line
**Barisan Nasional is heavily favored to retain Johor** in the 11 July 2026 snap election. The consensus across pollsters, analysts, and prediction markets is strong — the only real debate is the margin.

## Key Data Points
- **Prediction market:** Polymarket prices BN at **~95.9%** (7 July 2026)
- **Merdeka Center:** Projects BN winning **40–42 of 56 seats**
- **Analyst base cases:** Range from a BN landslide (53 seats, PH 3, PN 0) to a still-comfortable BN majority (39 seats) in a pro-PH scenario
- **2022 baseline:** BN held 40 of 56 seats

## The Four Themes You Asked About
1. **Green wave / PN:** Widely assessed to have **peaked and "imploded"** in Johor, mainly due to the PAS–Bersatu cooperation breakdown. Most projections have PN winning **0–3 seats**.
2. **Malay voters:** UMNO's Malay support **recovered to ~55–60%** (from ~45% at GE15) — the single biggest driver of BN's strength. A minor risk: younger Malays leaning toward protest votes.
3. **BN incumbency:** Strong — ~600,000 consistent votes, 80-year UMNO roots in Johor, 6.4% state growth in 2025, RM110bn FDI. (Caveat: state wins don't translate to federal — BN's 40 state seats became just 9/26 parliamentary seats at GE15.)
4. **Onn Hafiz:** Popular, youthful, hands-on image; his early dissolution signals confidence, though anything below 40 seats would be read as a strategic failure.

**Note:** One tool (AskNews) hit a credit limit, but I cross-validated all findings across Wikipedia, Merdeka Center, Fulcrum/ISEAS, The Edge Malaysia, FMT, The Star, and Polymarket. Full structured findings with data points and sources have been submitted.

sources.title: 2026 Johor state election
sources.snippet: Election expected 11 July 2026; dissolution announced 1 June 2026 by Onn Hafiz Ghazi; all 56 seats contested.

sources.title: Merdeka Center Forecasts BN To Retain Johor
sources.snippet: Merdeka Center projects BN to win 40-42 of 56 seats; Umno Malay support 55-60% up from ~45% at GE15.

sources.title: The 2026 Johor Election: Advantage Barisan Nasional?
sources.snippet: BN ~600,000-vote base; PN momentum imploded; Johor 6.4% growth, RM110bn FDI; Onn Hafiz youthful image.

sources.title: Opinion: Projecting the Johor state election results
sources.snippet: Pro-BN scenario BN 53/PH 3/PN 0; pro-PH BN 39/PH 14/PN 3; pro-PN PN 25/BN 21/PH 10.

sources.title: BN's odds of landslide win in Johor rising, says Kian Ming
sources.snippet: Ong Kian Ming projects BN 53 seats, PH 3, PN 0; Chinese/Indian support for PH peaked at GE15.

sources.title: 2026 Johor General Election Winner Predictions & Odds
sources.snippet: BN priced at ~95.9% on 7 July 2026, up from 84.5% on 1 July, peak 98.4% on 2 July.

sources.title: Johor and Negeri Sembilan state elections are double trouble for Anwar
sources.snippet: Johor (11 July) and Negeri Sembilan (1 August) polls test Anwar's PH; multi-ethnic southern states.

sources.title: State Polls 2026
sources.snippet: 2022 state polls: Barisan Nasional 40/56 seats, 53.55% voter turnout.
